summary: Complete testing of CRUD fix for Firmes Church Management Platform. Registration with auto tenant creation verified. All backend CRUD APIs working (Members, Categories, Positions, Custom Fields, Departments, Events, Groups, Group Categories). Frontend UI CRUD flows verified for Members (create, list), Departments (list, add dialog), Events (list, create dialog). Backend: 56 tests passed (31 Members + 25 Core CRUD). Frontend: All main CRUD pages working.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning - span cannot be child of tbody/tr elements

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warning in MembersList.jsx - span wrapping tr/tbody elements causing console errors (cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality)

success_rate.backend: 100% (56/56 tests passed - 31 Members module + 25 Core CRUD)

seed_data_creation: Created test member via UI (TEST_UI_Member_*) - cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRUD fix verified working. Registration now auto-creates tenant for admin_church role. All backend endpoints tested: auth/register, auth/login, members CRUD, member-categories CRUD, member-positions CRUD, custom-fields CRUD, departments CRUD, events CRUD, groups CRUD, group-categories CRUD. Frontend pages verified: Login, Register, Dashboard, Members list/add, Departments list/add dialog, Events list/create dialog. Previous iterations tested Groups (4), Ensino (5), Financial (6-7) modules - all working.

registration_with_tenant_creation.details: POST /api/auth/register with role=admin_church auto-creates tenant. Response includes tenant_id in token and user object.

login_with_tenant_id.details: POST /api/auth/login returns token with tenant_id for church admins

members_crud_backend.details: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/church/members with pagination, search, status/category/position filters

custom_fields_crud.details: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/church/custom-fields supporting text, select, date, checkbox types

departments_crud.details: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/church/departments with member enrichment and responsavel info

events_crud.details: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/church/events with event_date, event_time, location, capacity fields

frontend_members_page.details: Members list with search, filters. Add member form with all fields. Member created successfully via UI.

frontend_departments_page.details: Departments card view with Active/Archived tabs. Add dialog with name, description, icon, responsible, status, meeting schedule, member picker.

frontend_events_page.details: Events card view with check-in button. Create dialog with title, description, date, time, location, capacity, paid toggle.

frontend_register_page.details: Registration form includes Nome da Igreja (church_name) field for tenant auto-creation

coverage: Member Categories CRUD (create, list, update, delete)
Member Positions CRUD (create, list, update, delete)
Custom Fields CRUD (text field, select field, list, update, delete)
Members CRUD (create, list paginated, search, status filter, get by id, update, delete)
Registration Flow (register with tenant creation, duplicate email rejected)
Departments CRUD (create, list, get by id, update, delete)
Events CRUD (create, list, get by id, update, delete)
Group Categories CRUD (create, list, update, delete)
Groups CRUD (create, list, get by id, update, delete)
